title: Go 1.26 Repository, pgx, Migrations, and Reproduction · Changed-Input Lab
summary: An independent community archive receives a different publisher mix, malformed feed, validator state, tenant, schedule, database condition, accessibility need, platform, and injected failure and transfers go 1.26 repository, pgx, migrations, and reproduction into a changed reproducible Go feed-service repository baseline. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of reproducible Go feed-service repository baseline with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress th…
objectives: Capture revision, worktree, configuration, fixtures, secrets, migrations, licenses, and recovery anchor before editing.
Pin Go 1.26.5, pgx v5.10.0, goose v3.27.2, PostgreSQL 18.4, module sums, and supported platforms.
Keep command, application, domain, repository, fetch, parser, scheduler, HTTP, and presentation dependencies directed inward.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Feed Go Revision Baseline
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go team handles case 6250 during an accessible community-news reader review. Build deterministic Go evidence to reconcile Go, pgx, migration, dependency, clean-build, and artifact evidence; untrusted XML and feed content must not cross admission or rendering boundaries; then change one artifact, deployment, incident, backup, restore, rollback, or capacity condition and reconcile the release. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Capture revision, worktree, configuration, fixtures, secrets, migrations, licenses, and recovery anchor before editing.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Feed Go Revision Baseline.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for capture revision, worktree, configuration, fixtures, secrets, migrations, licenses, and recovery anchor before editing. For Feed aggregation and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Feed Go Revision Baseline, keep Feed Go Revision Baseline connected to executable Go feed, XML, HTTP, PostgreSQL, schedule, API, reader, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.
